name: broker-silent-on-callout
anchor: Layer 3 #6 (broker silent on Vienna's discrepancy callout — escalation timing)
rationale: Vienna sends prelim review with discrepancy callout (e.g., postal-code Risk Factors or elevated-LTV callout). Broker doesn't reply. After threshold, F4.CH chase email should fire (or admin handoff). Layer 3: silent-after-callout timing thresholds + chase content. LIKELY FRANCO-INPUT-REQUIRED.
notes: Single-event intake. Replay harness drives chase-cron forward; this fixture supplies the silent-after-prelim setup.
